sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(120) — Rock Creek Lake (Inyo Co.)
sources.quotedText: (120) Rock Creek Lake (Inyo Co.).  Last Sat. in Apr. through Nov. 15.  5 trout

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(a) — General provisions for the §7.50(b) special-regulation waters list
sources.quotedText: Unless otherwise provided, it is unlawful to possess more than one daily bag limit.

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (CDFW booklet)
Fishing Information — Rock Creek Lakes Resort
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon — CDFW
sources.quotedText: R6 Inyo Rock Creek Lake Rainbow Trout Catchable Put and Take April-November; R6 Inyo Rock Creek Lake Brown Trout Sub-catchable Put and Grow August-November; R6 Inyo Rock Creek Lake Rainbow Trout Sub-catchable Put and Grow August-November

sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":265501,"gaz_name":"Rock Creek Lake","gaz_featureclass":"Lake","state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Inyo"}; geometry (Web Mercator -13217764.6034, 4502367.4108) converts to lon -118.7372, lat 37.452492, which is ~1m from the file's recorded coordinate (-118.7372, 37.4525) — coordinate confirmed.

regulations.humanSummary: Open last Saturday in April through November 15
regulations.verbatimText: Last Sat. in Apr. through Nov. 15.

parameters.counting_rule: 5 trout daily bag; per CCR §7.50(a)(4), unless otherwise provided it is unlawful to possess more than one daily bag limit, so the possession limit is also 5 trout.

regulations.humanSummary: 5 trout daily bag and possession limit

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

stockingSchedule.note: CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon lists Rock Creek Lake (Region 6, Inyo Co.) as a Put and Take water stocked with catchable-size (approx. 7-12 in) Rainbow Trout, release month range April-November. This is a provisional annual plan; CDFW's execution is not guaranteed.

CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon lists Rock Creek Lake (Region 6, Inyo Co.) as a Put and Grow water stocked with sub-catchable-size (approx. 5-7 in) Brown Trout, release month range August-November. This is a provisional annual plan; CDFW's execution is not guaranteed.

CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon lists Rock Creek Lake (Region 6, Inyo Co.) as a Put and Grow water stocked with sub-catchable-size (approx. 5-7 in) Rainbow Trout, release month range August-November. This is a provisional annual plan; CDFW's execution is not guaranteed.
